_comment: Shared work-precision-diagram config, read by cadnip_wpd.jl, vacask_wpd.jl and plot_wpd.jl. Keep grid/tspan/sweep identical so Cadnip and VACASK are compared on the same time grid against the same golden reference.
_ref_comment: Golden = VACASK at ref_reltol with a fine maxstep (tspan/(n_grid*ref_maxstep_factor)) so the reference trajectory is accurate without tripping VACASK's min-timestep abort, which fires at very tight reltol on stiff diode switching. ref_abstol is used as VACASK's vntol.
_disabled_cases_comment: graetz (and the diode voltage multiplier) are wired up end-to-end but DISABLED because Cadnip's SPICE diode model currently does not conduct (a single diode reads as an open circuit in DC; the rectified output is 0). VACASK simulates them correctly. Re-enable by moving an entry back into 'cases' once the Cadnip diode model is fixed. The voltage multiplier additionally trips VACASK's min-timestep abort below reltol~1e-5, so it is a poor work-precision case regardless.
